akredatsiyalash.title: Accreditation
akredatsiyalash.description: To strengthen international cooperation in medical accreditation and quality management, a memorandum of understanding was signed with the National Accreditation Board for Hospitals and Healthcare Providers (NABH) of the Republic of India. This memorandum outlines cooperation on experience exchange, training programs, and harmonization of quality standards.

litsensiyalash.title: Licensing
litsensiyalash.description: A joint project is being implemented with the Republic of Kazakhstan to improve the licensing system in healthcare. The main goal is to study the experience of both countries, digitize the licensing process based on advanced international standards, and create a convenient, transparent, and efficient system for medical institutions.

memorandum.title: Memorandum
memorandum.description: The "CLAMO" project is a platform aimed at developing cooperation in the medical field. This project brings together medical professionals, researchers, and institutions to facilitate experience exchange, strengthen scientific collaboration, and develop innovative solutions.

RegulatorydocumentsPage.exampleContent: The answer to this question is located here.
RegulatorydocumentsPage.pageDescription: All essential services to improve the quality and processes of healthcare in one place, with convenient and effective solutions.
RegulatorydocumentsPage.law1Content: Regarding the 'Procedures for licensing, permitting, and notification processes'.
RegulatorydocumentsPage.law2Content: This is a brief description of the first law on accreditation.
RegulatorydocumentsPage.law3Content: This is a brief description of the second law on accreditation.
RegulatorydocumentsPage.centerRegulationsDescription: All essential services to improve healthcare quality and processes in one place with convenient and efficient solutions.
RegulatorydocumentsPage.centerRegulationsParagraph1: Our center's operations are carried out in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Uzbekistan, regulatory legal acts in the healthcare sector, as well as the internal regulations and assigned tasks of the Center.
RegulatorydocumentsPage.centerRegulationsParagraph2: According to the regulations, the Center operates on the basis of the following principles:
RegulatorydocumentsPage.centerRegulationsList2: Providing high-quality services and methodological assistance to medical organizations; implementing accreditation and licensing standards based on international experience;
RegulatorydocumentsPage.centerRegulationsList3: Fighting corruption and avoiding conflicts of interest;
RegulatorydocumentsPage.centerRegulationsParagraph3: All activities of the Center are carried out in accordance with defined priority areas and the annual work plan.
RegulatorydocumentsPage.govDecisionsDesc: All essential services to improve healthcare quality and processes in one place with convenient and efficient solutions.
RegulatorydocumentsPage.govDecision1Title: Decree of the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan
RegulatorydocumentsPage.govDecision1Text: According to clause b of section 7 of the Presidential Decree PQ-197 dated June 20, 2023, a state institution for licensing and accreditation in the healthcare system was established.
RegulatorydocumentsPage.govDecision2Title: Decree of the Cabinet of Ministers of the Republic of Uzbekistan
RegulatorydocumentsPage.govDecision2Text: According to the Decree No. 444 of the Cabinet of Ministers of July 24, 2024, the center for licensing and accreditation of medical institutions under the Ministry of Health of the Republic of Uzbekistan was launched.
RegulatorydocumentsPage.govDecision3Title: Order of the Minister of Health of the Republic of Uzbekistan
RegulatorydocumentsPage.govDecision3Text: According to the Minister of Health’s Order No. 311 dated October 4, 2024, measures were taken to organize the activities of the center for licensing and accreditation of medical institutions under the Ministry of Health of the Republic of Uzbekistan...
RegulatorydocumentsPage.normativeSectionDesc: Quickly and reliably obtain the necessary license for your organization. Clamo is your trusted partner in legal compliance.
